vocab.meaning: những dãy hành lang thiêng liêng (thường dùng để chỉ trường học với sự tôn kính)
vocab.example: Walking through the hallowed halls of my primary school always filled me with a sense of awe and discipline.
The teachers were excellent at instilling a thirst for knowledge in us from a very young age.

vocab.meaning: sự phát triển toàn diện (cả thể chất, tinh thần và trí tuệ)
vocab.example: What I loved most was the emphasis on holistic development rather than just academic scores.

vocab.meaning: sự hồi tưởng đầy yêu thương/kỷ niệm đẹp
vocab.example: I look back at my time at the village school with fond reminiscence, especially the outdoor lessons.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: I was fortunate to attend a school with state-of-the-art facilities that made science experiments truly exciting.
To be honest, I felt the rigid curriculum tended to stifle creativity and forced us to conform too much.
The history debates were particularly intellectually stimulating and kept me engaged throughout the week.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự gắn bó trong một tập thể
vocab.example: The sense of camaraderie among my classmates made even the toughest exam seasons bearable.

vocab.meaning: chương trình học cân bằng/toàn diện
vocab.example: My school offered a well-rounded curriculum that balanced rigorous mathematics with plenty of arts and sports.

vocab.meaning: áp lực từ bạn bè đồng lứa
vocab.example: While the education was great, dealing with peer pressure was a significant challenge during my middle school years.
